tools.name: list_programs
tools.description: Search and list college programs. Use this tool when users ask to find, search, list, or show programs. IMPORTANT: Only include degree and/or subject parameters if the user explicitly mentions them in their query. If the user doesn't mention a specific degree or subject, omit those parameters entirely to broaden the search and return results that better match the user's natural language query. CRITICAL: Reply to the user strictly based on the tool response. Do not add your own commentary or interpretation - use the returned program data exactly as provided.
